name: Shanghai Maling Aquarius Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai Maling Aquarius Co.,Ltd manufactures food products. The company offers meat and meat products, as well as canned products and snacks; and cold meat, steak, and beef products. It provides its products under the Merlin, Guanshengyuan, Zhengguanghe, SF, Su Shi, Ai Sen, Dabai Rabbit, Buddha Hand, Huaying, and 96658 brands. Shanghai Maling Aquarius Co.,Ltd was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.
